items.title: Greetings and Introductions
items.prompt: Practice greeting someone and introducing yourself in English.
items.hint: Use phrases like 'Good morning', 'How are you?', and 'My name is...'.
items.sample: Good morning! How are you? My name is Kate. Nice to meet you.

ja.prompt: 英語で誰かに挨拶して自己紹介を練習しましょう。
ja.hint: 'Good morning', 'How are you?', 'My name is...' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: Good morning! How are you? My name is Kate. Nice to meet you.

zh.prompt: 練習用英語問候和自我介紹。
zh.hint: 使用 'Good morning', 'How are you?', 'My name is...' 等短語。
zh.sample: Good morning! How are you? My name is Kate. Nice to meet you.

items.title: Asking and Answering About Objects
items.prompt: Ask and answer questions about objects using 'What's this?' and 'What's that?'.
items.hint: Use 'It's a...' to describe the object.
items.sample: What's this? It's a book. What's that? It's a box.

ja.prompt: 'What's this?' と 'What's that?' を使って物について質問し、答えましょう。
ja.hint: 'It's a...' を使って物を説明しましょう。
ja.sample: What's this? It's a book. What's that? It's a box.

zh.prompt: 用 'What's this?' 和 'What's that?' 詢問物品並回答。
zh.hint: 用 'It's a...' 來描述物品。
zh.sample: What's this? It's a book. What's that? It's a box.

items.title: Talking About Daily Routines
items.prompt: Describe your daily routine by answering questions like 'What time do you get up?'
items.hint: Use simple sentences like 'I get up at six.'
items.sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six.

ja.prompt: 『What time do you get up?』のような質問に答えて日課を説明しましょう。
ja.hint: 'I get up at six.' のような簡単な文を使いましょう。
ja.sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six.

zh.prompt: 回答 'What time do you get up?' 等問題來描述你的日常生活。
zh.hint: 使用簡單句子如 'I get up at six.'
zh.sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six.

items.title: Talking About Possessions
items.prompt: Ask and answer questions about ownership using 'Whose ... is this?' and 'It's ...'s.'
items.sample: Whose bike is this? It's Mike's bike.

ja.prompt: 'Whose ... is this?' と 'It's ...'s.' を使って所有物について質問し答えましょう。
ja.hint: 'Mike's bike' のような所有格を使いましょう。
ja.sample: Whose bike is this? It's Mike's bike.

zh.prompt: 用 'Whose ... is this?' 和 'It's ...'s.' 詢問及回答所有權。
zh.sample: Whose bike is this? It's Mike's bike.

items.title: Expressing Abilities
items.prompt: Practice saying what you can and cannot do using 'Can you ...?' and 'Yes, I can.' or 'No, I can't.'
items.hint: Use verbs like swim, jump, dance.
items.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can. Can you jump? No, I can't.

ja.prompt: 'Can you ...?' と 'Yes, I can.' または 'No, I can't.' を使ってできること・できないことを練習しましょう。
ja.hint: swim, jump, dance などの動詞を使いましょう。
ja.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can. Can you jump? No, I can't.

zh.prompt: 練習用 'Can you ...?' 和 'Yes, I can.' 或 'No, I can't.' 表達能力。
zh.hint: 使用動詞如 swim, jump, dance。
zh.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can. Can you jump? No, I can't.

items.title: Talking About Age
items.prompt: Ask and answer questions about age using 'How old are you?' and 'I'm ... years old.'
items.hint: Use numbers to say your age.
items.sample: How old are you? I'm five years old.

ja.prompt: 'How old are you?' と 'I'm ... years old.' を使って年齢について質問し答えましょう。
ja.hint: 数字を使って年齢を言いましょう。
ja.sample: How old are you? I'm five years old.

zh.prompt: 用 'How old are you?' 和 'I'm ... years old.' 詢問及回答年齡。
zh.sample: How old are you? I'm five years old.

items.title: Talking About Likes and Dislikes
items.prompt: Practice expressing likes and dislikes using 'Do you like ...?' and 'Yes, I do.' or 'No, I don't.'
items.hint: Use nouns like baseball, soccer, cheese, ham.
items.sample: Do you like baseball? No, I don't. I like soccer.

ja.prompt: 'Do you like ...?' と 'Yes, I do.' または 'No, I don't.' を使って好き嫌いを表現しましょう。
ja.hint: baseball, soccer, cheese, ham などの名詞を使いましょう。
ja.sample: Do you like baseball? No, I don't. I like soccer.

zh.prompt: 練習用 'Do you like ...?' 和 'Yes, I do.' 或 'No, I don't.' 表達喜好。
zh.hint: 使用名詞如 baseball, soccer, cheese, ham。
zh.sample: Do you like baseball? No, I don't. I like soccer.

items.title: Shopping and Asking Prices
items.prompt: Practice asking for help and prices in a store using 'May I help you?', 'How much is it?', and paying with money.
items.hint: Use numbers and currency words like dollars.
items.sample: May I help you? Yes, please. How much is it? It's five dollars.

ja.prompt: 店での助けを求めたり値段を聞いたりする練習をしましょう。'May I help you?', 'How much is it?' を使います。
ja.hint: 数字やドルなどの通貨の言葉を使いましょう。
ja.sample: May I help you? Yes, please. How much is it? It's five dollars.

zh.prompt: 練習用 'May I help you?'、'How much is it?' 及付款對話。
zh.hint: 使用數字和貨幣詞如 dollars。
zh.sample: May I help you? Yes, please. How much is it? It's five dollars.

items.title: Talking About Weather and Clothing
items.prompt: Describe the weather and what to wear using phrases like 'It's cold and windy.', 'Put on your coat.'
items.hint: Use weather words like snowing, raining, sunny and clothing items like coat, hat.
items.sample: It's snowing. Put on your coat, please.

ja.prompt: 天気や服装について 'It's cold and windy.', 'Put on your coat.' のようなフレーズで説明しましょう。
ja.hint: snowing, raining, sunny などの天気の言葉や coat, hat などの服の単語を使いましょう。
ja.sample: It's snowing. Put on your coat, please.

zh.prompt: 用 'It's cold and windy.', 'Put on your coat.' 等短語描述天氣和穿著。
zh.hint: 使用天氣詞如 snowing, raining, sunny 和服裝詞如 coat, hat。
zh.sample: It's snowing. Put on your coat, please.

items.title: Giving and Following Directions
items.prompt: Practice asking for and giving directions using phrases like 'Excuse me, where is ...?', 'Go straight and turn right.'
items.sample: Excuse me, where is the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

ja.prompt: 'Excuse me, where is ...?' と 'Go straight and turn right.' のようなフレーズで道案内を練習しましょう。
ja.hint: ランドマークや簡単な方向を使いましょう。
ja.sample: Excuse me, where is the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

zh.prompt: 練習用 'Excuse me, where is ...?' 和 'Go straight and turn right.' 問路與指路。
zh.sample: Excuse me, where is the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.
